description: The Corleonesi was an alliance of Mafia families within the Sicilian Mafia, formed in the 1970s. Led by Luciano Leggio, Salvatore Riina, Bernardo Provenzano, and others, it took over the Sicilian Mafia Commission and imposed a dictatorship over Cosa Nostra. The coalition waged the Second Mafia War from 1978–1983 and dominated until 2006.
